name: davinci-resolve
description: Control DaVinci Resolve from Claude — execute API calls, create timelines, manage media, render projects. Requires Resolve to be running locally.

commands.name: disable-transform
commands.description: Reset transforms on active timeline clips and set scaling to Scale to Fit

commands.name: restore-transform
commands.description: Restore previously backed-up transform values on active timeline clips

commands.name: create-timelines
commands.description: Create timelines from media pool clips with naming conventions

commands.name: explore
commands.description: Browse and inspect the media pool, timelines, and project structure

commands.name: import-media
commands.description: Import media files into the media pool

commands.name: project-info
commands.description: Show current project status — timelines, media pool, render queue

commands.name: render
commands.description: Set up and start render jobs for the active timeline
